style_markers: Opens with personal anecdote or local cultural observation
Pivots to data-backed insight after relatable setup
Uses questions to create information gaps
Conversational Indonesian with occasional English terms
exemplar_hooks: Beberapa waktu lalu gue ngebaca post X yang isinya cukup menggelitik. Isinya mempertanyakan: "Emang masih ada ya yang nonton film sendirian?...
